title: 75 Indian Students Win Erasmus Mundus Scholarships For 2026-28; EU Launches India Student Ambassador Network
description: Seventy-five Indian students have been selected for the prestigious Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degree scholarships for 2026-28. The scholars will study across 15 European countries in fields such as artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, renewable energy and health sciences. title: Administration of justice must remain fundamentally human endeavour: CJI

title: Wikipedia won't let AI edit articles, cofounder says
description: LONDON, United Kingdom — Wikipedia does not trust artificial intelligence enough to let it play a direct role in editing articles on its platform, cofounder Jimmy Wales told AFP on Monday.
content:
